long_description:

TIP Self Healing: true
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds: 4200
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:eu-gb::mzone797:pod:sysdig-agent-compute-s2w5v
IPOPS Enabled: False
